title: Memory/state closure implementation session close
body: Penumbral Veiling Owl closed claim codex-019e02-memory-state-closure after implementing Phase 4/5 closure blockers. Fixed PDR-049 Practice Core host-state leaks, moved the retired YAML seed to dated evidence, updated the stale agentic-engineering branch identity, tightened Doctor Phase 0/1 validation and TDD wording, regenerated the shared comms log, and verified the current start gate. Known practice fitness pressure remains routed health evidence; no memory or Practice Core substance was trimmed. No practice:substrate aliases were added.
